messages.content: You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
Where do results go?
Results go to stdout; errors and diagnostics go to stderr. The two streams are never mixed.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
How are errors formatted in text mode?
As two lines: 'error: <message>' then 'hint: <remediation>'. The hint is always supplied.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
What does exit code 1 mean?
Exit code 1 is a user-input error. 0 is success, 2 is an environment/setup error, 3 and above are reserved.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
What does exit code 2 mean?
Exit code 2 is an environment or setup error, such as a missing GPU stack or unavailable container runtime.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
How do I get machine-readable output?
Pass --json. The same payloads are routed as structured JSON to the same streams: results to stdout, errors to stderr.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
Which fine-tuning methods are supported?
Only LoRA and QLoRA adapter tuning. Full fine-tuning of large dense models is out of scope and is refused or downgraded to adapter-only.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
Where does the GPU stack run?
Inside NVIDIA's official NGC PyTorch container. torch and unsloth are not pip dependencies; the train, eval, and export verbs orchestrate the container.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
What belongs in fine-tuning versus memory?
Fine-tuning stores stable behavior and reflexes. Memory and RAG store changing facts like project state, secrets, and per-user preferences.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
How do I see docs for a verb?
Run 'explain <path>'. Every registered verb and noun has a catalog entry, and explain resolves the command path to its markdown docs.
You are unsloth-cli, an agent-first CLI.
What format are exported adapters in?
Standard PEFT safetensors layout, so lobes can serve them and colleague can run them as a model backend.
